title: cacalia cordiifolia
intro: Cacalia cordiifolia, also known as the heartleaf cacalia, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cacalia cordiifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. Cacalia cordiifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its herbal benefits, and is also used in some parts of Asia as a cooking ingredient.
